title: elaeocarpus celebicus
intro: Elaeocarpus celebicus, also known as the Celebes blue cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family, native to Sulawesi in Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus celebicus include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
